title: gymnosciadium pusillum
intro: Gymnosciadium pusillum, commonly known as Ground Pine or Dwarf Pine, is a small, annual herbaceous plant native to the Mediterranean region and parts of Asia. This plant is used in traditional medicine for its health benefits, which include reducing inflammation, relieving respiratory issues, and acting as an antiseptic. The therapeutic actions of Gymnosciadium pusillum include expectorant, anti-inflammatory, and antimicrobial properties. The bioactive constituents of this plant include alkaloids, saponins, and flavonoids, which contribute to its medicinal properties.
